_comment: Copy this to my-data.json and fill in your own info. my-data.json is gitignored.

workout._comment: Your weekly split — use the day name exactly. Set to 'Rest' for rest days.

focusProject._comment: What you're building right now. Rotated manually when the project changes.
focusProject.name: My Project
focusProject.why: Why this is the focus right now
focusProject.next: The single most important next action to make progress

study._comment: What you're studying this week. Update as exams approach.
study.subject: Subject Name
study.reason: Why this is the priority study session

extraPriorities: _comment: These merge with calendar-derived priorities. Remove this comment line.
A standing commitment or recurring priority you always want surfaced

tips._comment: Prep tips for an upcoming event. Update before important meetings. Set to null to hide.
items: A prep tip to show on the dashboard
